# Berlin Management Group

> AI operations consulting for Arizona businesses. We automate back-office processes so your best people can focus on the work that actually makes you money.

## About

Berlin Management Group (BMG) is an AI operations consulting firm based in Phoenix, Arizona. Founded by Brad Berlin, a 15-year operations executive, BMG helps small and mid-size businesses automate repetitive back-office work using artificial intelligence. We specialize in turning manual processes like estimating, invoicing, reporting, and data entry into AI-powered workflows.

## What Makes BMG Different

- Operations-led: Our founder ran operations departments before touching AI. We understand the actual workflows, not just the technology.
- Performance-based pricing: Clients pay 20% of documented savings. If the automation doesn't save money, BMG doesn't get paid.
- Arizona-local: We work on-site with Valley businesses. We learn your tools, your team, and your processes firsthand.
- Industry-specific: We go deep in one vertical at a time, learning the language, tools, and pain points before expanding.
- Plain English: No jargon, no dashboards you'll never use. We explain everything in terms business owners understand.

## Services

- Back-office process automation (estimating, invoicing, reporting, data entry)
- AI tool selection and implementation
- Historical data digitization and database creation
- Workflow audit and optimization
- Custom AI tool development for industry-specific workflows
- Free Operations Audit for qualifying businesses

## Industries Served

- Commercial Construction (active engagements)
- Professional Services
- Trades and Field Services
- Any industry where teams spend more time on spreadsheets than on revenue-generating work

## Ideal Client

- Small to mid-size Arizona businesses (10-200 employees)
- Owner-operators and business owners approaching retirement
- Companies where back-office processes are manual, spreadsheet-heavy, or error-prone
- Businesses that have tried software before but found it too complex or expensive

## Location

Phoenix Metropolitan Area, Arizona, United States
